53.start_command_hints: 使用 --privileged=true --shm-size=128g host 网络启动 ASR 容器。
53.task_command_hints: 在容器内执行 ASR 评测脚本，完成健康检查、样例音频推理、CER/WER 统计，并将结果写入 /workspace/results/result.json。
53.task_command: MODEL_NAME=SenseVoiceSmall && DATASET_NAME=kespeech-beijing && mkdir -p /workspace/logs/${MODEL_NAME} && python3 -u /workspace/infer_runner.py --model_dir /workspace/models/${MODEL_NAME} --output_dir /workspace/results/${MODEL_NAME}/predictions/ --acc_report /workspace/results/${MODEL_NAME}/acc_report.json --data_set /workspace/config/data_set.cfg --dataset ${DATASET_NAME} 2>&1 | tee /workspace/logs/${MODEL_NAME}/test.log && python3 -c "import json; p='/workspace/results/${MODEL_NAME}/acc_report.json'; acc=json.load(open(p)); records=acc.get('records',[]); first=records[0] if records else {}; details=first.get('metrics',{}); metrics={'dataset':first.get('dataset',''),'avg_inference_time':first.get('avg_inference_time',0),'success_rate':first.get('success_rate',0),'total_samples':first.get('total_samples',0),'cer':details.get('cer'),'wer':details.get('wer')}; json.dump({'status':'completed','metrics':metrics,'evaluation_results':{'records':records}},open('/workspace/results/result.json','w'),ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)"

70.start_command_hints: 优先复用已有 tangyufeng 容器；如需新建，使用 host 网络、IPC=host，并挂载 /mnt/nvme1n1:/mnt/nvme1n1。
70.task_command_hints: 优先检查 http://127.0.0.1:18080/v1/models 和 /v1/chat/completions；完成 5-10 次样例请求，统计成功率、平均延迟、P95，并写入 /workspace/results/result.json。

172.start_command_hints: 使用 --privileged=true --shm-size=128g host 网络启动 ASR 容器。
172.task_command_hints: 在容器内执行 ASR 评测脚本，完成健康检查、样例音频推理、CER/WER 统计，并将结果写入 /workspace/results/result.json。
172.task_command: MODEL_NAME=SenseVoiceSmall && DATASET_NAME=kespeech-beijing && mkdir -p /workspace/logs/${MODEL_NAME} && python3 -u /workspace/infer_runner.py --model_dir /workspace/models/${MODEL_NAME} --output_dir /workspace/results/${MODEL_NAME}/predictions/ --acc_report /workspace/results/${MODEL_NAME}/acc_report.json --data_set /workspace/config/data_set.cfg --dataset ${DATASET_NAME} 2>&1 | tee /workspace/logs/${MODEL_NAME}/test.log && python3 -c "import json; p='/workspace/results/${MODEL_NAME}/acc_report.json'; acc=json.load(open(p)); records=acc.get('records',[]); first=records[0] if records else {}; details=first.get('metrics',{}); metrics={'dataset':first.get('dataset',''),'avg_inference_time':first.get('avg_inference_time',0),'success_rate':first.get('success_rate',0),'total_samples':first.get('total_samples',0),'cer':details.get('cer'),'wer':details.get('wer')}; json.dump({'status':'completed','metrics':metrics,'evaluation_results':{'records':records}},open('/workspace/results/result.json','w'),ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)"
